description: Critical-by-default key patterns for the shared Lace UI translation set (packages/contract/i18n, consumed by every wrapper app). A source key matching one of these patterns is accuracy-critical (financial / security consequence). Under strict / permissive tolerance, check:i18n-provenance requires its technique to be human-reviewed (one of exact-reuse, verbatim, mtpe, human — never a raw machine draft such as machine-translated or the unconfirmed exact-ambiguous pool pick) AND, unless it is a deliberate `verbatim`, requires the key to be listed in verified-critical-{lang}.json (parallel manual check complete). Bypassed under pre-production tolerance. Globs are matched against SOURCE keys, `*` = any chars. Patterns are derived from the real @lace-contract/i18n en.json namespaces (NOT carbon.*-prefixed). Covers the strategy's critical-by-default surfaces; see docs/i18n-strategy.md.
